user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to switch to a different plan tier.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: I'd like to switch plans.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to subscribe to a value-added add-on.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Add this feature to my line.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to activate a new device on their line.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Help me activate my new device.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to update multiple account fields at once.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: I need to update a few things at once.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to report a service outage in their area.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: There's an outage in my area.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to upgrade to a new device.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: I'm ready for an upgrade.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to resume a previously suspended line.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Reactivate my line, please.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to suspend their service.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Pause my service temporarily.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to check their remaining contract term.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: How long is left on my contract?

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Agent delivers information back to the customer.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Just FYI on your account.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Agent asks the customer to clarify an ambiguous intent.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Quick — which option did you mean?
